chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-817 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 06-12-2023 Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G a/w Haji Banhon, CMO, Municipal Committee, Pirjogoth. ***** CMO, M.C, Pirjogoth is present and has submitted original cheque of Rs.100,000/- dated 07.12.2023, which is handed over to the petitioner. He further undertakes that remaining amount of pensionery benefits to the tune of Rs.6,97,495/- would be paid to the petitioner in equal installment of Rs.200,000/- per month. Petitioner being satisfied does not press this petition, which is accordingly disposed of. Let such compliance report of each month be submitted to this Court for perusal in chamber. However, non-payment of aforesaid amount to the petitioner within the aforesaid period would expose the violators to the contempt proceedings. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
